scripts.db:psql: docker exec -it narrativeos-postgres psql -U narrativeos -d narrativeos
scripts.db:init-db: docker exec -i narrativeos-postgres psql -U narrativeos -d narrativeos < packages/database/src/migrations/001_embeddings.sql
scripts.db:init: pnpm db:push && pnpm db:migrate && pnpm db:init-db
scripts.db:reset: docker exec narrativeos-postgres psql -U narrativeos -d narrativeos -c "TRUNCATE TABLE ai_proposals, chapters, discussions, llm_logs, mou_states, notification_reads, notifications, outline_items, outlines, project_daily_stats, project_settings, projects, sessions, setting_item_relations, setting_items, volumes CASCADE;"
